codeReview.summary: The feature implementation is narrowly scoped and correct: contact copy now explicitly frames outreach around fit/alignment and keeps contact@statecraft.systems as the primary method. Transcript evidence shows build and route checks were executed, and current navigation/internal link targets are consistent with the final site structure.

summary: Pass. The page-contact change and associated integration checks are consistent with the feature requirements and no blocking or non-blocking defects were identified.
